title: stelis neglecta
intro: Stelis neglecta is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its small white flowers and slender stems. Traditionally, Stelis neglecta has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. Stelis neglecta is often prepared in herbal teas or infusions, as well as in tinctures or extracts, to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
